description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of glass, concrete, and wood exterior finishes. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, multiple balconies with glass railings, and a rooftop green space. The house includes an outdoor pool, a spacious wooden deck with lounge furniture, and a carport on one side. The landscaping is minimal, with a few strategically placed trees and shrubs. The main entryway is accessible via a staircase and is accentuated by a sleek, minimalist design. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and open, emphasizing indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and an outdoor pool on a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, balconies, rooftop garden, and carport.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase entry, upper balcony, and the pool area with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, pool, and extensive glass walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the rear glass facade with balcony access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with straight staircase, glass door, and no porch or overhang
